NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING -- PLAINTIFF CITIBANK SOUTH DAKOTA, N.A.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT: OFF CALENDAR. CASE SETTLED ON 2/28/05. (301/Hon. JAMES L. WARREN) Reporter Joseph Vickstein, CSR #4780

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-28-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Arthur Schwachman, Esq for Plaintiff
Raymond Burke, Esq. specially appearing for Defendant
Court Trial for collection settled pursuant to stipulation of the parties as follows: Defendant to pay $233.73 for 36 months starting 4-10-05, for total sum of $8,414.22. Parties to pay their own fees and costs. Counsel for plaintiff to prepare stipulatin for entry of Judgement.
